ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size specification */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., Child XS, Adult XS) */,
  "bust_min" INTEGER /* Minimum bust measurement */,
  "bust_max" INTEGER /* Maximum bust measurement */,
  "waist_min" INTEGER /* Minimum waist measurement */,
  "waist_max" INTEGER /* Maximum waist measurement */,
  "hip_min" INTEGER /* Minimum hip measurement */,
  "hip_max" INTEGER /* Maximum hip measurement */,
  "girth_min" INTEGER /* Minimum girth measurement */,
  "girth_max" INTEGER /* Maximum girth measurement */,
  "sleeve_length_min" INTEGER /* Minimum sleeve length measurement */,
  "sleeve_length_max" INTEGER /* Maximum sleeve length measurement */,
  "shoulder_width_min" INTEGER /* Minimum shoulder width measurement */,
  "shoulder_width_max" INTEGER /* Maximum shoulder width measurement */,
  "inseam_min" INTEGER /* Minimum inseam length measurement */,
  "inseam_max" INTEGER /* Maximum inseam length measurement */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., child, adult) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender the size is intended for (e.g., male, female, unisex) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the size is currently active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the size was created */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the size */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "last_updated_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Design, Manufacturing, Quality Control) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, manufacturer, quality control) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_logged_in_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size that was changed */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "changed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "old_bust_min" INTEGER /* Previous minimum bust measurement */,
  "old_bust_max" INTEGER /* Previous maximum bust measurement */,
  "old_waist_min" INTEGER /* Previous minimum waist measurement */,
  "old_waist_max" INTEGER /* Previous maximum waist measurement */,
  "old_hip_min" INTEGER /* Previous minimum hip measurement */,
  "old_hip_max" INTEGER /* Previous maximum hip measurement */,
  "old_girth_min" INTEGER /* Previous minimum girth measurement */,
  "old_girth_max" INTEGER /* Previous maximum girth measurement */,
  "old_sleeve_length_min" INTEGER /* Previous minimum sleeve length measurement */,
  "old_sleeve_length_max" INTEGER /* Previous maximum sleeve length measurement */,
  "old_shoulder_width_min" INTEGER /* Previous minimum shoulder width measurement */,
  "old_shoulder_width_max" INTEGER /* Previous maximum shoulder width measurement */,
  "old_inseam_min" INTEGER /* Previous minimum inseam measurement */,
  "old_inseam_max" INTEGER /* Previous maximum inseam measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_changed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_access_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
